name: mcp-server-qdrant
description: An official Model Context Protocol server for keeping and retrieving memories in the Qdrant vector search engine. It acts as a semantic memory layer on top of the Qdrant database.

tools.name: qdrant-store
tools.description: Store some information in the Qdrant database

tools.name: qdrant-find
tools.description: Retrieve relevant information from the Qdrant database

env.name: QDRANT_API_KEY
env.description: API key for the Qdrant server

env.name: COLLECTION_NAME
env.description: Name of the default collection to use.

env.name: QDRANT_LOCAL_PATH
env.description: Path to the local Qdrant database (alternative to QDRANT_URL)

env.name: EMBEDDING_PROVIDER
env.description: Embedding provider to use (currently only "fastembed" is supported)

env.name: EMBEDDING_MODEL
env.description: Name of the embedding model to use

env.name: TOOL_STORE_DESCRIPTION
env.description: Custom description for the store tool

env.name: TOOL_FIND_DESCRIPTION
env.description: Custom description for the find tool
